case_title: MARY DESTRI VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-11-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARON, MD, JEFFREY M.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESTRI, MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER ARON, MD, JEFFREY M. CLAIMS OF MEIDCAL MALPRACTICE MUST BE SUPPORTED BY EXPERT TESTIMONY; PLAINTIFF DID NOT OFFER SUCH EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DESTRI, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER ARON, MD, JEFFREY M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
